# Governance files protected by the local finalize path and remote PR approval.
# Local changes may be admitted during bootstrap/finalize, but merge is blocked
# until `validate pr-governance` verifies reviewed remote approval.
#
# === Governance (protected by remote PR approval) ===
.github/copilot-instructions.md
.github/agent-model-policy.yaml
.github/CODEOWNERS
.github/github-governance.yaml
.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug-task.yml

.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml
.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature-task.yml
.github/instructions/agents.instructions.md
.github/instructions/docs.instructions.md
.github/project-governance.md
.github/workflows/pr-governance.yml
.github/agents/CONTEXT_ZONE_DIVIDER.txt
